examples: I don't like fish skin—not seared or crispy.
We set a nice table, have a crispy salad and some garlic bread.
The scent of that crispy brown turkey, fluffy mashed potatoes, savory stuffing, and assorted vegetables made my mouth water.
When roasted, the skin becomes crispy on the outside and juicy on the inside.
Atop this mixture was placed a cod filet, pan seared until the skin is crispy.
